default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Augment Code and Growth X teams to discuss progress, updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Oggy CLI launch pending; Growth X team ready, waiting on Augment Code's development](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [SEO content strategy shift: pausing new content to improve existing articles and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [New geo experiment planned using Reddit seeding and engagement tactics](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Augment Code finalizing new targets and OKRs this week, impacting future content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

## Topics

### Oggy CLI Progress

  - [Malaysia reviewing workflows; first batch of 70-80 ready](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Launch timeline unclear due to other priorities (e.g., pricing changes, Q model launch)](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Growth X team ready; waiting on Augment Code's development and CLI functionality](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Dev rel team to review and provide input on example workflows and comments](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### SEO Content Strategy

  - [SEO performance plateaued recently; focus on improving existing content](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Plan to pause new content creation for a week to:](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Consolidate overlapping articles (e.g., 5 articles into 1-2)](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Upgrade workflows for better content quality](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [Optimize keyword usage (e.g., "AI Coding Tool" vs. "AI Coding Assistant")](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Content appearing in \~25% of tracked prompts, up from almost none initially](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [SEO still driving majority of clicks despite prompt appearances](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

### Geo Experiment and Reddit Strategy

  - [Targeting two subreddits with seeded posts for specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Vendor found to provide controlled accounts for posting](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Capability to seed posts, comments, and upvotes](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [PR pending to add FAQs and executive summaries to guides and blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [A/B testing planned for TLDR and FAQ additions](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### Augment Code Updates

  - [New pricing and Q model launched this morning](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Planning new direction and targets with CEO and initial team](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Finalizing numbers and commitments this week](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### YouTube Strategy

  - [Growth X considering adopting Augment Code's YouTuber recruitment strategy](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Augment Code's AJ (TechFen) manages their YouTube presence](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Approach: Target creators with 5-10K followers, posting 1-2 pieces daily](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Initial contract work, then potential full-time hire if successful](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sylvain to finalize new targets and OKRs by end of week/early next week](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Growth X to reshape content artifacts based on new ICP (awaiting Sylvain's review)](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Growth X to focus on geo experiments and content improvement this week](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Sylvain to review Oggy CLI example workflows and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Jason to check Octave and Attention.Tech invites from Sylvain](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Growth X to explore recruiting smaller YouTubers for channel optimization](https://fathom.video/share/5xX3gYn-j4P1rawx3EVXgko6KaZT5k9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

action_items.description: Update content creation artifacts w/ new personas, enterprise focus. Add content cluster layer for persona coverage.
Pause new content creation. Rewrite/optimize old content, fix workflows w/ new artifacts. Focus on SEO improvement.
Start geo experiment - seed posts targeting keywords in 2 subreddits. Use vendor for accounts, comments, upvotes.
Implement A/B test for TLDR/FAQ additions to guides/blog pages. Compare batches w/ and w/o these elements.
Review 2 example workflows for Augie CLI. Get dev rel team to review, add comments/suggestions.
Finalize planning w/ CEO, initial team. Commit to new target numbers for revised direction.
Prepare reshaped artifacts based on new ICP. Send to Sylvain for review once OKRs are finalized.
